headlines.headline: Ilval Financial misses quarterly revenue estimates by 25%

sentiment.reasoning: A significant 25% revenue miss indicates immediate operational weakness and likely negative investor sentiment.

sentiment.reasoning: A 10% margin improvement directly signals increased operational efficiency and profitability potential.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
